lighting.shadow_character: Short, soft shadows with preserved detail in the dark areas, achieved by using a white bounce card or a weak fill light from the front-right.

color.grading_style: Matte film look with lifted blacks and a slight brown/magenta tint in the shadows.

composition.angle: 45-degree angle, looking slightly down at the subject.
composition.focus_point: The front part of the food, where the meat topping and rice meet.
composition.composition_rule: Rule of Thirds, with the main dish placed slightly to the lower-left of center.

texture.detail_rendering: Excellent rendering of textures, including the rough bowl, linen tablecloth weave, wood grain, and the moistness of the food.

mood.tone: Minimal, neat, warm, and cozy, reminiscent of MUJI or Kinfolk magazine style.

improvement_notes: For a more dramatic look, emphasize the rim light and deepen the shadows. For a more commercial feel, selectively boost saturation and clarity on the food. For a more dynamic composition, try a close-up shot or include a human element.
nano_banana_prompt: /imagine prompt: a professional commercial food photograph of [YOUR FOOD HERE], minimalist kinfolk style, shot on a full-frame camera with an 85mm f/2.8 lens, the main dish is placed slightly off-center on a linen tablecloth, soft and warm side-backlight coming from the left creating gentle shadows, filled with a reflector from the right, shallow depth of field, focus on the texture of the food, color graded with a warm and muted palette, dominant colors are beige and cream, subtle film grain, looks like a photo from a high-end cookbook, kodak portra 400 film aesthetic, clean, natural, and inviting mood --ar 4:3 --style raw --q 2 --s 250
